WITN09420100
WITN09420100

20. In response to the question concerning whether anyone at the Post Office or Fujitsu expressed any concern about bugs, errors or defects in Horizon, to the best of my recollection, the first time any issues concerning errors or defects came to light was in Mr Coyne's Report.

21. I confirm that I have not had any subsequent involvement.

General – Questions

22. I have been asked whether I was involved in any other challenges to the Horizon system other than the Wolstenholme litigation. I have no recollection of being involved in any other challenges to the system.

23. In response to the question as whether there are any other matters which I consider are of relevance to the Inquiry, I confirm that I am not aware of any such matters.

Statement of Truth
I believe the content of this statement to be true.

Signed: GRO

Dated: 14 July 2023

Page 7 of 10
